nasb.text: Jesus withdrew to the sea with His disciples; and a great multitude from Galilee followed; and also from Judea,

esv.text: Jesus withdrew with his disciples to the sea, and a great crowd followed, from Galilee and Judea

cnv.text: 耶穌和門徒退到海邊去，一大群從加利利來的人跟著他；

ccb.text: 耶稣和门徒退到湖边，有一大群人从加利利来跟随祂。

csbs.text: 耶稣与他的门徒们退到湖边，有一大群从加利利来的人跟随他；还有来自犹太、
